channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Army deny IPOB’s claims about fake IED pictures, say images came from real South-East operations
item.description: The Nigerian Army don talk say the Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB) and their supporters dey use tribe-based propaganda to scatter correct information about military work wey dem dey do for the Sout...

item.title: Jeepney drivers plan nationwide strike on March 19 over fuel price hikes
item.description: Jeepney drivers under the transport group PISTON announced a nationwide strike on March 19 to protest the soaring fuel prices, which have reached P100 per liter. PISTON President Mody Floranda stated ...

item.title: Wilbert Tolentino achieves college degree at age 50
item.description: Wilbert Tolentino, a Filipino entrepreneur and public personality, recently completed his college education at the age of 50. Despite years of focusing on his business ventures and public engagements,...

item.title: Dubai Airport Flights Resume Following Temporary Suspension Due to Drone Incident
item.description: Flights at Dubai International Airport were briefly disrupted on Monday morning when a drone struck a fuel tank near the airport amid rising tensions in West Asia. Dubai authorities confirmed that the...

item.title: Fifteen-vehicle collision on M73 in Scotland leaves five people hospitalised, including two children
item.description: Emergency services responded to a significant road traffic collision involving 15 vehicles on the northbound carriageway of the M73 motorway in Scotland on Sunday evening, 15 March 2026. The incident ...

item.title: KSE-100 Index Falls Sharply by 4,360 Points Amid Ongoing Market Turbulence and External Pressures
item.description: On Monday, Pakistan's main share index, the KSE-100, experienced a significant drop of 4,360.66 points by 1:10pm, which equals a decline of 2.83 percent from its previous closing level of 153,866.16 p...

item.title: Nairobi Governor Directs Immediate Measures to Address Flooding and Road Damage
item.description: Nairobi Governor Johnson Sakaja has called for urgent action to address the worsening flooding and infrastructure damage caused by the recent heavy rains in the city. During an emergency meeting at Ci...

item.title: Viewers criticise Jonathan Ross for name mispronunciations and technical issues during ITV's Oscars coverage
item.description: During ITV's broadcast of the 98th Academy Awards on 15 March 2026, presenter Jonathan Ross faced significant backlash from viewers on social media. Critics accused him of repeatedly mispronouncing no...

item.title: Met Police investigate controversial chant at London Al Quds Day protest
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have launched an investigation following reports that rapper Bob Vylan, real name Pascal Robinson-Foster, led chants of 'death, death to the IDF' during a static Al Quds Day de...

item.title: Supreme Court Quashes Proceedings Against Ashoka University Professor Mahmudabad After Haryana Declines Prosecution
item.description: The Haryana government has informed the Supreme Court that it will not grant sanction to prosecute Professor Ali Khan Mahmudabad of Ashoka University over his comments on press briefings related to Op...

item.title: Sunday Igboho Warns Against Atiku and Obi Campaigning in Yoruba Land, Supports Tinubu
item.description: Sunday Igboho, the Yoruba Nation activist, don clear say nobody go fit carry campaign for Atiku Abubakar or Peter Obi for South-West Nigeria ahead of the 2027 presidential election. For one video wey ...

item.title: Experts raise concerns over AI and image rights in Kenya’s proposed Copyright Bill
item.description: The proposed Copyright and Related Rights Bill 2026, introduced by the Copyright Board of Kenya, has stirred a lot of discussions among intellectual property (IP) lawyers. The Bill aims to update Keny...

item.title: Adrian Villados Leads Criss Cross to Continue Winning Streak in Spikers Turf
item.description: Adrian Villados, recognized as the Player of the Week in the Spikers Turf Open Conference, played a crucial role in helping the Criss Cross volleyball team maintain their unbeaten record. His impressi...

item.title: FSF Requests Anthropic to Release AI Models Under Free License Due to Copyright Concerns
item.description: In 2024, Anthropic faced a lawsuit alleging copyright infringement during the training of its large language models (LLMs). Recently, the Free Software Foundation (FSF) raised concerns that Anthropic'...

item.title: Satyajit Ray’s Tale of a Fortune Teller and a Son’s Justice
item.description: This excerpt from Satyajit Ray’s 'Uncle Tarini, the Fortune Teller' narrates the intriguing story of a palmist, Uncle Tarini, and his experiences in Nagpur. After leaving the film industry, Tarini beg...

item.title: Saskatoon’s Lakewood Civic Centre to replace waterslide after safety inspection
item.description: The City of Saskatoon has permanently closed the iconic big blue waterslide at Lakewood Civic Centre after a recent safety inspection deemed it unsafe for public use. The slide was originally schedule...

item.title: Government and Private Sector Strengthen Partnership for Universal Health Coverage
item.description: The Tanzanian government has confirmed its commitment to collaborating with private sector partners to boost universal health coverage in the country. Dr Grace Magembe, the Chief Medical Officer, spok...

item.title: Verstappen struggles with car issues at Chinese Grand Prix
item.description: Four-time Formula 1 champion Max Verstappen had a tough weekend at the Chinese Grand Prix in Shanghai. On Saturday, during the Sprint race, Verstappen struggled with his car’s balance and high tyre de...

item.title: Perpetual sells wealth management unit to Bain Capital after staff departures
item.description: Bain Capital has completed its acquisition of Perpetual's wealth management unit for around $500 million, ending a drawn-out corporate restructuring process that lasted nearly two and a half years. Th...

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 Oscars Afterparties
item.description: Following the 2026 Academy Awards, Hollywood’s elite gathered at several high-profile afterparties, notably the Governors Ball and the Vanity Fair event at the Los Angeles County Museum of Art. Among ...
